sessions.summary: User committed to cutting food delivery spending in half (from ₹12,890 to ~₹6,445/month) and transferring ₹30,000 to their house fund this month, which is realistic given their ₹1,20,000 salary and ₹46,500 in committed bills.
commitments: Cut food delivery spending to ₹6,445/month (half of ₹12,890)
Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund on November 25th, 2025
Keep total monthly variable spending (excluding bills) under control to maintain savings target
insights: Food delivery at ₹12,890/month was the largest discretionary expense in October — halving it frees up ₹82,000 annually toward house goal
House fund goal is ₹15 lakh in 2 years; currently at ₹95,000 with ₹30,000/month transfers would reach target in ~3.5 years
Monthly income of ₹1,20,000 with ₹46,500 committed bills leaves healthy savings capacity when discretionary spending is controlled
